## Plugin Submission

**Plugin name:** <!-- e.g., my-awesome-plugin -->
**Category:** <!-- e.g., productivity, devops, code-quality -->
**Type:** <!-- New plugin / Update to existing plugin -->

### Description

<!-- Briefly describe what this plugin does and why it's useful -->

### Checklist

- [ ] Plugin folder follows the structure: `plugins/<category>/<plugin-name>/`
- [ ] `.claude-plugin/plugin.json` includes `name`, `version`, and `description`
- [ ] Plugin name is kebab-case
- [ ] At least one component is included (skill, agent, command, hook, or MCP/LSP config)
- [ ] `README.md` is included with usage instructions
- [ ] If updating an existing plugin, the version has been bumped
- [ ] I've tested this plugin locally with Claude Code

### Testing

<!-- How did you test this plugin? -->
